# The Robo Battle Ground
> India's Premier Combat Robotics Arena

## About
The Robo Battle Ground (TRBG) is a combat robotics 
arena and internship program based in Jaipur, 
Rajasthan, India.

## Services
- RoboWar Arena: Full-scale combat robot battles
- BattleBot Pit: Build and test facility  
- Machining & Fabrication: CNC, 3D printing, 
  laser cutting, PCB manufacturing
- Internship Program: Hands-on robotics training

## Contact
Email: therobobattleground@gmail.com
WhatsApp: +91 85298 96177
Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

## Certificate Verification
Verify internship certificates at:
https://therobobattleground.in/verify

## Pages
- /arena - Arena booking and services
- /machining - Fabrication services
- /internships - Internship program
- /projects - Student projects showcase
- /verify - Certificate verification
- /about - About the team
- /contact - Contact and enquiries
